text: tracker.py exceeds pylint too-many-lines threshold (1238 lines)

split off fsck into integrity. we don't need to preserve public API, we're a self-contained project, so no compat layers please. also see if something else can be cleanly split off into a separate file, e.g. the remote logic implementation.

Follow-up refactor (commit 08e66e9): remote.py module-level fn(tracker, ...) pattern replaced with RemoteSync class composed into Tracker via self.remote. Call sites now read as tracker.remote.pull(r), tracker.remote.push(r), etc. Events/issue-I/O split in tracker.py deferred to a separate ticket.
